enrichment.summary: Kyle records a casual daily vlog on December 1, 2016 from his home in Boulder. He discusses his reversed sleep schedule, getting a flat screen TV from his mom, plans to haul firewood with his van, and progress on his 3D modeling project recreating ancient Rome, which he expects to eventually turn into YouTube walkthrough videos.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Acknowledges it is reversed and plans to fix it once he starts working again
Feels he is over the hump and making real progress, intends to fill the full Aurelian wall boundary even if it means taking liberties with undocumented areas

stances.topic: Google 3D Rome map (made by someone else)
stances.position: Impressed but believes his version will include details theirs missed, like the water channel around Circus Maximus
